ddls:
CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of the material (e.g., Paper, Plastic, Metal) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the material */,
  "material_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each material */,
  "recyclable" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the material is recyclable */,
  "compostable" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the material is compostable */,
  "hazardous" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the material is hazardous */,
  "recycling_process" TEXT /* Description of the recycling process for the material */,
  "composting_process" TEXT /* Description of the composting process for the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "waste_composition" (
  "composition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waste composition record */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  "disposed_percent" REAL /* Percentage of the material disposed of */,
  "disposed_tons" REAL /* Tonnage of the material disposed of */,
  "recycle_percent" REAL /* Percentage of the material recycled */,
  "recycle_tons" REAL /* Tonnage of the material recycled */,
  "organics_percent" REAL /* Percentage of the material composted as organics */,
  "organics_tons" REAL /* Tonnage of the material composted as organics */,
  "other_percent" REAL /* Percentage of the material categorized as other */,
  "other_tons" REAL /* Tonnage of the material categorized as other */,
  "generated_percent" REAL /* Percentage of the material generated */,
  "generated_tons" REAL /* Tonnage of the material generated */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the waste composition data */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the waste composition data */,
  "source" TEXT /* Description of the source of the waste */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the waste composition data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("composition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waste_composition_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waste_composition_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector (e.g., Residential, Commercial, Industrial) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "sector_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each sector */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the sector */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the sector's main office or location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the sector (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "waste_generation" (
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waste generation record */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material */,
  "generated_tons" REAL /* Tonnage of the material generated */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date of waste generation */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of waste generation */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of waste generation */,
  "source" TEXT /* Description of the source of the waste */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the waste generation data */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the record */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("generation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waste_generation_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waste_generation_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waste_generation_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data entry clerk, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the account */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the account was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the account */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the account was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view report) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user when accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or device used to access the system */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the access (e.g., city, country) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
